title: Eriolaena quinquelocularis

The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. In traditional medicine, this plant is often used to prepare herbal decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
